message:
perf(daemon): async cleanup - send response before destroying instance

Move instance destruction to background thread, reducing request latency
from ~14ms to ~4ms (3x improvement).

Before: Request → Execute → Destroy (blocking ~10ms) → Response
After:  Request → Execute → Response → Queue cleanup (async)

Changes:
- Add cleanup queue with dedicated thread for async destruction
- Send HTTP response immediately after execution
- Queue dirty instances for background cleanup
- Fall back to sync destroy if queue full (rare under normal load)
